title: trifolium caudatum
intro: Trifolium caudatum, also known as the Long-stalked Clover, is a species of clover plant that belongs to the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium caudatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Trifolium caudatum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
